name: Financial Analyst Squad+
description: Multi-agent swarm for cross-market crypto analysis, fundamental monitoring, and automated risk management.

agents.goal: Scan the BTCUSDT market using sc_fetch_binance_ticker and report technical entry signals.
agents.name: BTC Quant

agents.goal: Research global macro news affecting crypto (interest rates, CPI) and provide a sentiment report.
agents.name: Macro Economist

agents.goal: Continuously monitor the trading environment for unauthorized access or security risks.
agents.name: Security Sentinel

agents.goal: Compile the Technical Signals and Macro Sentiment. Output a final decision on capital allocation sizing.
agents.name: Chief Risk Officer
